root.description: An optional list of subdomains to use for API gateway
root.name: subdomains

root.description: Controls if resources should be created
root.name: create

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Map of API gateway authorizers to create
root.name: authorizers
root.type:
map(object({
    authorizer_credentials_arn        = optional(string)
    authorizer_payload_format_version = optional(string)
    authorizer_result_ttl_in_seconds  = optional(number)
    authorizer_type                   = optional(string, "REQUEST")
    authorizer_uri                    = optional(string)
    enable_simple_responses           = optional(bool)
    identity_sources                  = optional(list(string))
    jwt_configuration = optional(object({
      audience = optional(list(string))
      issuer   = optional(string)
    }))
    name = optional(string)
  }))

root.description: Whether to create Route53 records for the domain name
root.name: create_domain_records

root.description: The ARN of an AWS-managed certificate that will be used by the endpoint for the domain name. AWS Certificate Manager is the only supported source
root.name: domain_name_certificate_arn

root.description: An API key selection expression. Valid values: `$context.authorizer.usageIdentifierKey`, `$request.header.x-api-key`. Defaults to `$request.header.x-api-key`. Applicable for WebSocket APIs
root.name: api_key_selection_expression

root.description: The IP address types that can invoke the API. Valid values: ipv4, dualstack. Use ipv4 to allow only IPv4 addresses to invoke your API, or use dualstack to allow both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses to invoke your API. Defaults to ipv4.
root.name: ip_address_type

root.description: Optional domain name of the Hosted Zone where the domain should be created
root.name: hosted_zone_name

root.description: Indicates the hosted zone being looked up is private.  Certificate validation will fail if this is set to true.
root.name: private_zone

root.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the stage resource
root.name: stage_tags

root.description: Part of quick create. Specifies any route key. Applicable for HTTP APIs
root.name: route_key

root.description: Whether to create API domain name resource
root.name: create_domain_name

root.description: Whether to create a certificate for the domain.  Since certificate validate only works on public domains, this will be ignore if `private_zone` is set to `true`
root.name: create_certificate

root.description: A mapping of tags to assign to API gateway resources
root.name: tags

root.description: Whether clients can invoke the API by using the default execute-api endpoint. By default, clients can invoke the API with the default `{api_id}.execute-api.{region}.amazonaws.com endpoint`. To require that clients use a custom domain name to invoke the API, disable the default endpoint
root.name: disable_execute_api_endpoint

root.description: Part of quick create. Quick create produces an API with an integration, a default catch-all route, and a default stage which is configured to automatically deploy changes. For HTTP integrations, specify a fully qualified URL. For Lambda integrations, specify a function ARN. The type of the integration will be HTTP_PROXY or AWS_PROXY, respectively. Applicable for HTTP APIs
root.name: target

root.description: A list of record types to create for the subdomain(s)
root.name: subdomain_record_types

root.description: The name of the stage. Must be between 1 and 128 characters in length
root.name: stage_name

root.description: Whether to deploy the stage. `HTTP` APIs are auto-deployed by default
root.name: deploy_stage

root.description: A map of tags to add to the VPC Links created
root.name: vpc_link_tags

root.description: The name of the API. Must be less than or equal to 128 characters in length
root.name: name

root.description: The route selection expression for the API. Defaults to `$request.method $request.path`
root.name: route_selection_expression

root.description: The domain name to use for API gateway
root.name: domain_name

root.description: The mutual TLS authentication configuration for the domain name
root.name: mutual_tls_authentication

root.description: Map of API gateway routes with integrations
root.name: routes
root.type:
map(object({
    # Route
    authorizer_key             = optional(string)
    api_key_required           = optional(bool)
    authorization_scopes       = optional(list(string), [])
    authorization_type         = optional(string)
    authorizer_id              = optional(string)
    model_selection_expression = optional(string)
    operation_name             = optional(string)
    request_models             = optional(map(string), {})
    request_parameter = optional(object({
      request_parameter_key = optional(string)
      required              = optional(bool, false)
    }), {})
    route_response_selection_expression = optional(string)

    # Route settings
    data_trace_enabled       = optional(bool)
    detailed_metrics_enabled = optional(bool)
    logging_level            = optional(string)
    throttling_burst_limit   = optional(number)
    throttling_rate_limit    = optional(number)

    # Stage - Route response
    route_response = optional(object({
      create                     = optional(bool, false)
      model_selection_expression = optional(string)
      response_models            = optional(map(string))
      route_response_key         = optional(string, "$default")
    }), {})

    # Integration
    integration = object({
      connection_id             = optional(string)
      vpc_link_key              = optional(string)
      connection_type           = optional(string)
      content_handling_strategy = optional(string)
      credentials_arn           = optional(string)
      description               = optional(string)
      method                    = optional(string)
      subtype                   = optional(string)
      type                      = optional(string, "AWS_PROXY")
      uri                       = optional(string)
      passthrough_behavior      = optional(string)
      payload_format_version    = optional(string)
      request_parameters        = optional(map(string), {})
      request_templates         = optional(map(string), {})
      response_parameters = optional(list(object({
        mappings    = map(string)
        status_code = string
      })))
      template_selection_expression = optional(string)
      timeout_milliseconds          = optional(number)
      tls_config = optional(object({
        server_name_to_verify = optional(string)
      }))

      # Integration Response
      response = optional(object({
        content_handling_strategy     = optional(string)
        integration_response_key      = optional(string)
        response_templates            = optional(map(string))
        template_selection_expression = optional(string)
      }), {})
    })
  }))

root.description: Map of VPC Link definitions to create
root.name: vpc_links

root.description: The API protocol. Valid values: `HTTP`, `WEBSOCKET`
root.name: protocol_type

root.description: The cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) configuration. Applicable for HTTP APIs
root.name: cors_configuration
root.type:
object({
    allow_credentials = optional(bool)
    allow_headers     = optional(list(string))
    allow_methods     = optional(list(string))
    allow_origins     = optional(list(string))
    expose_headers    = optional(list(string), [])
    max_age           = optional(number)
  })

root.description: The description of the API. Must be less than or equal to 1024 characters in length
root.name: description

root.description: Whether warnings should return an error while API Gateway is creating or updating the resource using an OpenAPI specification. Defaults to `false`. Applicable for HTTP APIs
root.name: fail_on_warnings

root.description: The identifier of a client certificate for the stage. Use the `aws_api_gateway_client_certificate` resource to configure a client certificate. Supported only for WebSocket APIs
root.name: stage_client_certificate_id

root.description: Part of quick create. Specifies any credentials required for the integration. Applicable for HTTP APIs
root.name: credentials_arn

root.description: The [API mapping key](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/apigateway-websocket-api-mapping-template-reference.html)
root.name: api_mapping_key

root.description: Whether to create routes and integrations resources
root.name: create_routes_and_integrations

root.description: Whether to create default stage
root.name: create_stage

root.description: The default route settings for the stage
root.name: stage_default_route_settings
root.type:
object({
    data_trace_enabled       = optional(bool, true)
    detailed_metrics_enabled = optional(bool, true)
    logging_level            = optional(string)
    throttling_burst_limit   = optional(number, 500)
    throttling_rate_limit    = optional(number, 1000)
  })

root.description: A map that defines the stage variables for the stage
root.name: stage_variables

root.description: An OpenAPI specification that defines the set of routes and integrations to create as part of the HTTP APIs. Supported only for HTTP APIs
root.name: body

root.description: A version identifier for the API. Must be between 1 and 64 characters in length
root.name: api_version

root.description: ARN of the AWS-issued certificate used to validate custom domain ownership (when certificate_arn is issued via an ACM Private CA or mutual_tls_authentication is configured with an ACM-imported certificate.)
root.name: domain_name_ownership_verification_certificate_arn

root.description: Settings for logging access in this stage. Use the aws_api_gateway_account resource to configure [permissions for CloudWatch Logging](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/set-up-logging.html#set-up-access-logging-permissions)
root.name: stage_access_log_settings
root.type:
object({
    create_log_group            = optional(bool, true)
    destination_arn             = optional(string)
    format                      = optional(string)
    log_group_name              = optional(string)
    log_group_retention_in_days = optional(number, 30)
    log_group_kms_key_id        = optional(string)
    log_group_skip_destroy      = optional(bool)
    log_group_class             = optional(string)
    log_group_tags              = optional(map(string), {})
  })

root.description: The description for the stage. Must be less than or equal to 1024 characters in length
root.name: stage_description

root.description: The ARN of the certificate
root.name: acm_certificate_arn

root.description: Map of API Gateway Authorizer(s) created and their attributes
root.name: authorizers

root.description: The domain name identifier
root.name: domain_name_id

root.description: The API mapping selection expression for the domain name
root.name: domain_name_api_mapping_selection_expression

root.description: The domain name configuration
root.name: domain_name_configuration

root.description: Map of the routes created and their attributes
root.name: routes

root.description: Name of cloudwatch log group created
root.name: stage_access_logs_cloudwatch_log_group_name

root.description: Map of VPC links created and their attributes
root.name: vpc_links

root.description: The ARN of the domain name
root.name: domain_name_arn

root.description: The target domain name
root.name: domain_name_target_domain_name

root.description: The Amazon Route 53 Hosted Zone ID of the endpoint
root.name: domain_name_hosted_zone_id

root.description: The stage identifier
root.name: stage_id

root.description: The ARN prefix to be used in an aws_lambda_permission's source_arn attribute or in an aws_iam_policy to authorize access to the @connections API
root.name: stage_execution_arn

root.description: The URL to invoke the API pointing to the stage
root.name: stage_invoke_url

root.description: Arn of cloudwatch log group created
root.name: stage_access_logs_cloudwatch_log_group_arn

root.description: URI of the API, of the form `https://{api-id}.execute-api.{region}.amazonaws.com` for HTTP APIs and `wss://{api-id}.execute-api.{region}.amazonaws.com` for WebSocket APIs
root.name: api_endpoint

root.description: Map of the integrations created and their attributes
root.name: integrations

root.description: Domain name of the stage (useful for CloudFront distribution)
root.name: stage_domain_name

root.description: The stage ARN
root.name: stage_arn

root.description: The API identifier
root.name: api_id

root.description: The ARN of the API
root.name: api_arn

root.description: The ARN prefix to be used in an `aws_lambda_permission`'s `source_arn` attribute or in an `aws_iam_policy` to authorize access to the `@connections` API
root.name: api_execution_arn
